# SATX AI Lab

> SATX AI Lab provides hands-on AI training, consulting, and implementation for small businesses in San Antonio metro, Texas. Founded by TJ Larkin, we serve San Antonio, Alamo Heights, Stone Oak, Schertz, Converse, New Braunfels, and Boerne.

## About

SATX AI Lab is led by TJ Larkin, an AI consultant and media operator based in Liberty Hill, Texas. TJ runs a 145,000+ subscriber newsletter network, co-founded lightbreak.ai, and builds with Claude Code, ChatGPT, voice agents, and workflow automation daily.

Services: 75-minute AI Consulting Sessions ($299), AI On Call monthly advisory ($799/month), and on-site team AI training (custom quoted) for businesses across the San Antonio metro area.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.satxailab.com/): Services overview, founder bio, and booking
- [About TJ Larkin](https://www.satxailab.com/about): Founder background, experience, credentials
- [Services](https://www.satxailab.com/services): Full breakdown of AI Consulting, AI On Call, On-Site Training
- [Contact](https://www.satxailab.com/contact): Booking and application
- [Blog](https://www.satxailab.com/blog): Practical AI articles for local business owners

## Sister Sites

For Austin metro businesses, see ATX AI Lab at https://www.atxailab.com. For Williamson County businesses (Round Rock, Georgetown, Cedar Park, Leander), see WilCo AI Lab at https://www.wilcoailab.com. Same team, different service areas. SATX AI Lab focuses on San Antonio metro including Alamo Heights, Stone Oak, Schertz, and New Braunfels.
